text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
At summer camp, Manhattan Cafe is exerting herself something
fierce.

text_block_list.name: Manhattan Cafe
text_block_list.text: Pant, pant...

text_block_list.name: Manhattan Cafe
text_block_list.text: Phew...
choice_data_list: Good work. Let's call it a night.

text_block_list.name: Manhattan Cafe
text_block_list.text: But Trainer...

text_block_list.name: Manhattan Cafe
text_block_list.text: Under...stood. Thank you for today. But, um...

text_block_list.name: Manhattan Cafe
text_block_list.text: Have I improved... this summer?

text_block_list.name: Manhattan Cafe
text_block_list.text: Okay... Well in that case... there's something I'd like you to do for me.

text_block_list.name: Manhattan Cafe
text_block_list.text: It's very... important.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
Manhattan Cafe asked me to come watch her race tonight. When I
reach the meeting place, I notice that she is alone.

text_block_list.name: Manhattan Cafe
text_block_list.text: Thank you for coming... Trainer.

text_block_list.name: Manhattan Cafe
text_block_list.text: Everything has... led to tonight. I need you... to see this.
choice_data_list: Will you be racing your friend?

text_block_list.name: Manhattan Cafe
text_block_list.text: No, not her. The truth is...

text_block_list.name: Manhattan Cafe
text_block_list.text: The other one... is here. Right... behind you...

text_block_list.name: Manhattan Cafe
text_block_list.text: Don't turn around. It's... after you.

text_block_list.name: Manhattan Cafe
text_block_list.text:
As long as it can see me... you are safe. It may try to draw you away...
however...

text_block_list.name: Manhattan Cafe
text_block_list.text: I don't know. But...

text_block_list.name: Manhattan Cafe
text_block_list.text: I won't let it happen.

text_block_list.name: Manhattan Cafe
text_block_list.text: I'm going to beat it tonight... and put an end to this. Trainer...

text_block_list.name: Manhattan Cafe
text_block_list.text: Do you believe me?

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
I swallow hard. I have no idea what will happen if she loses, but I
know that there is only one answer to the question at hand.

text_block_list.name: Manhattan Cafe
text_block_list.text: Thank you... Shall we get going?

text_block_list.name: Manhattan Cafe
text_block_list.text:
The rules are simple. We'll run to that big rock, and then back. The
first one to reach you again is the winner.

text_block_list.name: Manhattan Cafe
text_block_list.text: It's fast... But...

text_block_list.name: Manhattan Cafe
text_block_list.text:
I won't lose. I've also... gotten faster. And it's all thanks to your
guidance...

text_block_list.name: Manhattan Cafe
text_block_list.text: I'm ready. Can you give us the signal?

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
I nod and take a step back, then raise my arm to give the starting
signal.

text_block_list.name: Manhattan Cafe
text_block_list.text: Ha!

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
She takes a deep breath, then dashes off into the night. Her
silhouette melts into the murky darkness, just as I have witnessed
many times before.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
I see only her shadow, yet strangely, I think I see another set of
footprints behind hers, as if someone is giving chase.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
I can see the sand being kicked up behind them, and it indicates that
they are about neck-and-neck. Cafe leads barely, a fierce look
emblazoned across her visage.

text_block_list.name: Manhattan Cafe
text_block_list.text:
(You really are... fast. You've always... wanted to run like this, haven't
you?)

text_block_list.name: Manhattan Cafe
text_block_list.text:
(To run like this... To get faster... But you couldn't tell anyone...
because no one can see you...)

text_block_list.name: Manhattan Cafe
text_block_list.text: (Oh! So that's why... you needed my trainer...)

text_block_list.name: Manhattan Cafe
text_block_list.text: (If anyone, Trainer would certainly believe in you...)

text_block_list.name: Manhattan Cafe
text_block_list.text:
You won't be able to see her... No one can, no matter how hard they
look...

text_block_list.name: Manhattan Cafe
text_block_list.text:
I'm the only one... who ever notices her. She... she remains far away,
even from me...

text_block_list.name: Manhattan Cafe
text_block_list.text: I was sure... that you couldn't see her. But it really feels like... you can...

text_block_list.name: Manhattan Cafe
text_block_list.text: (You wanted... to be noticed... Noticed by Trainer... But...)

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
A sudden strong wind kicks up the sand, blocking my view. The
runners should be arriving at my position any moment now, but I can't
see a thing.

text_block_list.name: Manhattan Cafe
text_block_list.text: I won't let you... take Trainer away!

text_block_list.name: Manhattan Cafe
text_block_list.text: Hraaah!

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
Suddenly, and as though it was a figment of my imagination, the wind
storm subsides, and the beach is calm once more.

text_block_list.name: Manhattan Cafe
text_block_list.text: It... no, she... has gone. Probably because... she was able to do what she'd always wanted...

text_block_list.name: Manhattan Cafe
text_block_list.text: And that was... to run like everyone else.

text_block_list.name: Manhattan Cafe
text_block_list.text:
Like everyone at the academy... To win and lose... To get faster and
stronger...

text_block_list.name: Manhattan Cafe
text_block_list.text: But... No one was able to acknowledge her.

text_block_list.name: Manhattan Cafe
text_block_list.text:
If only... I had noticed sooner, then she might not have gone after
you...
choice_data_list: But she must be happy now, right?
But she must be happy now, right?

text_block_list.name: Manhattan Cafe
text_block_list.text: I think... she is...

text_block_list.name: Manhattan Cafe
text_block_list.text: You're really... quite the unusual person...

text_block_list.name: Manhattan Cafe
text_block_list.text:
You... must've been scared this whole time... Yet you were able to
move on... like it was nothing.

text_block_list.name: Manhattan Cafe
text_block_list.text: (Someone like you... is what she needed... and what I...)

text_block_list.name: Manhattan Cafe
text_block_list.text: Oh!

text_block_list.name: Manhattan Cafe
text_block_list.text: There's a shooting star... It's like she's running off... into the night...

text_block_list.name: Manhattan Cafe
text_block_list.text: Um... Trainer... Would it be okay if... we stayed here a bit longer?

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
All falls silent, and Manhattan Cafe and I gaze upon the night sky for
a while. This has truly become an unforgettable summer camp.
